nasb.text: And he made houses on high places, and made priests from among all the people who were not of the sons of Levi.

esv.text: He also made temples on high places and appointed priests from among all the people, who were not of the Levites.

cnv.text: 耶羅波安在邱壇那裡建殿，把不是利未子孫的平民立為祭司。

ccb.text: 耶罗波安又在高岗上修建神庙，任命各样的人做祭司，他们并非利未人。
